summary: Verified the Picker import fix on /app/frontend/app/professional/slots.tsx. Both navigation paths (Professional dashboard 'Conduct Interview' CTA + 'Interviews' bottom-tab) now successfully render the slots screen with all controls (Date / From / To / Topic / Skill Set / Picker / Create slot). The 'Your Total Experience' Picker opens a bottom-sheet exposing 0–30+ Years and selection updates the field correctly. No console pageerrors and GET /api/interviews/slots returns 200. Bug fix is confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: slots.tsx imports look clean. EXPERIENCE_OPTIONS named import is correctly used and the Picker component is rendered with proper testID prefix (slot-exp / slot-exp-opt-<value>).

Minor (pre-existing, not regression): RN web console emits deprecation warnings 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' — likely from a shared component (Card/Button shadows). Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Signed up a fresh professional via /api/auth/signup + /api/auth/verify-otp using mock_otp (TEST_RETURN_OTP=1). Account: pro_test_1781331136@acmecorp.io / Pro@12345.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login inputs use data-testid on the underlying <input> element directly (not a wrapper). For React Native Input components, prefer page.get_by_placeholder() OR page.fill('[data-testid="x"]', value) — there is NO inner <input> child to chain ('login-email input' fails). Picker bottom-sheet exposes options as data-testid='<picker-testid>-opt-<value>' e.g. slot-exp-opt-5, slot-exp-opt-30+.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: slots.tsx used <Picker /> JSX without importing the component (only a stale inline require for EXPERIENCE_OPTIONS existed). At runtime this raised 'Picker is not defined' on /professional/slots → blank crash from both the dashboard 'Conduct Interview' CTA and the 'Interviews' tab. Fix applied by main agent: added `import { Picker } from '@/src/components/Picker'` and `import { EXPERIENCE_OPTIONS } from '@/src/lib/constants'` and removed the inline require. Verified end-to-end via Playwright (mobile viewport 390x844): both routes render the slots screen, the Picker opens its bottom-sheet with 31 options (0..29, 30+), selecting an option updates the bound state, and no pageerrors fire.
